channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BCCI Secretary Reaffirms Rohit Sharma's ODI Future Amid Retirement Speculation
item.description: India's cricket board (BCCI) secretary Devajit Saikia has dismissed rumors suggesting that Sunday's one-day international against England at Lord’s will be opener Rohit Sharma's last match. The 39-yea...

item.title: Security Forces Successfully Neutralize Terror Threat in Wana
item.description: Security forces in Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province successfully foiled a major terrorist attempt in Wana, South Waziristan district, through an intelligence-based operation. A vehicle carrying ...

item.title: google's inaction allows toxic ads to ruin android app ecosystem
item.description: The article critiques the current state of Android's free app ecosystem, blaming Google for failing to address intrusive and user-hostile advertising practices. It highlights how modern ads have evolv...

item.title: Erwan Heussaff Discusses Past Controversies Involving Butter Carbonara and Uncooked Sago

item.title: NBA Election Delayed Due to Cyberattack
item.description: The Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) 2026 national election has started after a delay caused by a cyberattack on its voting platform. The election, initially scheduled for midnight Saturday, faced disru...

item.title: Policy Decisions for Economic Development and Expansion

item.title: India's Private Space Mission Marks Historic Milestone in Orbital Launch Capabilities
item.description: India has achieved a significant milestone in its space program by becoming the third country to demonstrate private orbital launch capability following the successful maiden flight of the Vikram-1 ro...

item.title: Boston Bar family evacuates with 15 pets amid wildfire crisis
item.description: Brittany Alenius and her husband, along with their four children, evacuated their home in Boston Bar, British Columbia, after being ordered to leave due to wildfires. The family faced the challenge of...

item.title: Pakistan prolongs airspace restrictions on Indian aircraft until August 24, 2026
item.description: Pakistan has extended its ban on Indian aircraft using its airspace until August 24, 2026, following government directives. The Pakistan Airports Authority issued a new Notice to Airmen (NOTAM) to for...

item.title: School Bus Crash Claims 20 Lives; Father's Last-Minute Decision Saves His Children
item.description: A father of two pupils at King David Junior School made a last-minute decision to keep his children home during a school trip that ended in a tragic bus accident, saving their lives. The incident, whi...

item.title: Tyla collaborates with Bratz on collector doll inspired by her fashion moments
item.description: South African singer Tyla has partnered with Bratz to create a collector doll inspired by her iconic fashion moments, including her Met Gala attire and performance style. The doll features two outfits...

item.title: Alex Eala's authenticity and success inspire Filipinos
item.description: Tennis star Alex Eala has become a beloved figure in the Philippines due to her genuine personality and dedication to her sport. Her recent Wimbledon achievements, including reaching the fourth round ...

item.title: Lena Headey Condemns Hollywood's Protection of Predatory Men
item.description: Lena Headey, known for her role in Game of Thrones, has criticized Hollywood's systemic protection of predatory men in the entertainment industry. In an interview with The Telegraph, she discussed her...

item.title: Tanzania's Samia Skills Program Exceeds Targets
item.description: The article highlights the success of Tanzania's Samia skills formalisation program, which has surpassed its targets. Kilosa, a region in Tanzania, is experiencing positive impacts from improved healt...

item.title: Alberta's Budget Outlook Shifts Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: Alberta's fiscal outlook has undergone a significant transformation after previously forecasting a $9.4-billion deficit. Surging oil prices, which have exceeded $70 US per barrel, are now projected to...

item.title: Man Arrested for Multiple Driving Offenses in Dickson
item.description: A 38-year-old man from Dickson has been arrested following alleged driving offenses that include operating an unregistered, uninsured vehicle while disqualified from driving. Police identified the Mit...

item.title: Updated Screen Time Guidelines for Kids Focus on Context Over Limits
item.description: Recent research has prompted a shift in screen time guidelines for children, moving away from strict time limits toward a more nuanced approach that considers the context of digital media use. Experts...

item.title: Kenyan Prince Apologizes to Girlfriend with Cash Gift After Controversy
item.description: Stephanie Ngunjiri, girlfriend of social media influencer Kenyan Prince, shared a TikTok video showing a suitcase filled with KSh 1,000 notes wrapped in clear tape. The cash gift was part of Prince's ...

item.title: Opinion: Simon Tisdall argues Trump's handling of the Iran conflict has deepened international instability
item.description: In this opinion article, Simon Tisdall argues that Donald Trump's leadership, rather than Iran itself, has become the principal source of international instability during the renewed conflict between ...

item.title: Legal expert argues no basis for Gbajabiamila's resignation over PFIPC allegations
